title: LedgerEvent envelope (v2)
description: Append-only ledger event envelope. Every runtime event in the /multiagent track is wrapped in this structure with SHA-256 hash chaining. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) — events are self-describing and causally linked; ledger alone suffices to reconstruct session history.

event_id.description: ULID-based event identifier. Monotonic time-ordered. Crockford base32.

event_type.description: Sprint-1 event type registry. Additional types added in later sprints.

sequence_number.description: Monotonic sequence number within a session. Authoritative ordering field.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with microsecond precision.

auditor_id.description: Orchestrator-layer stricter pattern than v1 schema permits. Enforces Invariant 1 provenance at the event level.

prior_event_id.description: ULID of a causally prior event (e.g., AGENT_SUSPENDED references its AGENT_REGISTERED).

referenced_artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact this event acts on (e.g., agent_id for agent-lifecycle events).

referenced_event_id.description: Secondary event reference slot. Reserved for future cross-event links.

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical-JSON serialization of the prior event in this session's chain. Null for genesis event.

event_hash.description: SHA-256 over the canonical-JSON of this event with event_hash removed. Computed at write time.
